overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian urban environment in a video game, featuring abandoned commercial buildings, massive holographic advertising towers, overgrown streets with accumulated trash piles, and elevated railway structures under a partly cloudy midday sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned commercial alley with trash accumulation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alley between abandoned buildings, passing piles of garbage bags on the right

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting an elevated structure, showing rust and decay at the base
large accumulated piles of blue and white garbage bags spilling onto the path
tall cylindrical structure with multiple rotating holographic display rings showing advertisements
derelict two-story buildings with boarded windows and faded signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow alley between abandoned commercial buildings. The camera moves forward past substantial piles of garbage bags on the right, heading toward a massive holographic advertising tower visible in the distance. Concrete support pillars line the left side, and dry vegetation grows through cracks in the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central holographic monument

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the holographic advertising tower from below

agents.ego_description: circling the base of the holographic tower while looking up at the rotating display rings

entered.detail: multi-story residential blocks with mustard-yellow facades and multiple satellite dishes
heavy concrete elevated track with green metal railings running above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide open plaza and tilts up to examine the massive holographic tower from below, revealing its complex mechanical structure and rotating advertisement displays. Yellow apartment buildings become visible in the background as the camera circles the monument, with an elevated railway structure spanning the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned residential street with trash piles

events.description: moving from the tower plaza into the residential area with yellow apartment buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the yellow apartment buildings across an overgrown plaza area

entered.detail: massive accumulated heaps of garbage bags reaching the second story of buildings
tall palm trees scattered throughout the residential area

segments.scene_description: Leaving the holographic tower behind, the camera moves toward a residential district dominated by yellow apartment buildings. The ground becomes increasingly overgrown with grass, and massive piles of accumulated trash become prominent features in the center of the view. Palm trees dot the landscape, and satellite dishes are visible on the building rooftops.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential building front with vending machines and garbage accumulation

agents.ego_description: approaching the building front and examining the vending machines and trash piles at close range

entered.detail: vintage red soda vending machine with Japanese text and illuminated buttons
blue snack vending machine with product display and payment interface
multiple white satellite dishes mounted on the apartment building balconies

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the yellow apartment buildings closely, revealing two vending machines—one red and one blue—standing before massive piles of garbage bags that spill from the building entrances. Satellite dishes dot the building facades, and the camera moves past the trash heaps toward a covered arcade area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade under elevated railway

events.description: a pedestrian appears walking toward the camera in the distance under the arcade

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade toward a distant figure

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera through the arcade wearing white top and red pants

entered.detail: massive square concrete pillars supporting the elevated railway above, creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered arcade beneath the elevated railway, supported by massive concrete pillars. The lighting becomes more diffused as the sky is obscured by the overhead structure. A lone pedestrian appears in the distance walking toward the camera, creating the first human encounter in the abandoned environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into a sprawling, overgrown plaza and finally into a shadowed transit arcade. It begins by pushing forward through a narrow passage lined with concrete pillars and garbage bags, moving toward the glow of a distant holographic tower. As the camera emerges into a wide plaza, it tilts upward to reveal the tower's rotating mechanical displays before circling toward a backdrop of yellow apartment buildings and an elevated railway. The scene then shifts into a residential district where the asphalt gives way to wild grass and palm trees, leading the camera past red and blue vending machines and massive heaps of trash spilling from building entrances. Finally, the movement carries the viewer beneath the heavy concrete supports of the railway into a diffused, semi-covered arcade where a lone pedestrian appears in the distance.
